accommodations.text: Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.
accommodations.source_quote: no unplanned oral responses in front of the class

accommodations.text: Permit brief movement breaks between tasks.
Provide a word bank for written-response items in reading and history.
accommodations.source_quote: provide a word bank for written-response items

accommodations.text: Provide audio versions of grade-level texts.

services.provider_role: Teacher of the deaf and hard of hearing
services.source_quote: Deaf/hard-of-hearing itinerant support 30 minutes twice weekly
Speech and language therapy 30 minutes twice weekly

goals.text: Sofia will produce /r/ in the initial position of words with 80% accuracy in structured tasks.
goals.target: 80% accuracy in structured tasks across three sessions.

goals.text: Priya will use correct past-tense verbs in structured sentences with 80% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Uses correct past-tense verbs with 50% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: use correct past-tense verbs with 80% accuracy

goals.text: Marcus will use a taught script to join a peer activity in 3 of 4 structured opportunities.
goals.baseline: Joins a peer activity with adult prompting in 1 of 4 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: use a taught script to join a peer activity

goals.text: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Begins a task within two minutes in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: independently begin a classroom task within two minutes
